## MPRESS

MPRESS is a free packer. It makes programs and libraries smaller, and decrease start time when the application loaded from a slow removable media or from the network.

It uses in-place decompression technique, which allows to decompress the executable without memory overhead or other drawbacks; it also protects programs against reverse engineering by non-professional hackers. Programs compressed with MPRESS run exactly as before, with no runtime performance penalties.

* * *
